political.s: FEC: $21K PAC donations; 95% to Republican, 5% to Democratic committees.

environment.s: hazardous waste violation: $12.5M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

wiki.extract: AutoZone, Inc., doing business as AutoZone, is an American retailer of aftermarket automotive parts and accessories, the largest in the United States. Founded in 1979, AutoZone has 7,140 stores across the United States, Mexico, Puerto Rico, Brazil, and the US Virgin Islands. The company is based in Memphis, Tennessee.

fec.committeeName: AUTOZONE INC COMMITTEE FOR BETTER GOVERNMENT

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On August 18, 2025, at approximately 7:00 p.m., an employee was working on a ladder when they fell to the floor. The employee sustained a fractured clavicle.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee put a till in a safe and closed the safe door when her finger was caught in the door, resulting in a partial fingertip amputation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Contact with hot objects or substances
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was in a parking lot, helping a customer whose vehicle was overheating. The employee lifted the vehicle's hood and removed the radiator cap and hot radiator fluid sprayed him, burning his face, right hand, and chest.
As an employee was dismounting a ladder, their left little finger became caught on the ladder and their fingertip was amputated above the first joint.

sampleRecords.nature: Cuts, lacerations, punctures without injury to internal structures
sampleRecords.event_description: Stabbing, cutting, slashing by other person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was engaged in a disagreement with a customer when they stabbed the employee in the abdomen with a knife.

sampleRecalls.title: Prestone Recalls Shop Pro RV & Marine Antifreeze Due to Risk of Methanol Poisoning; Sold Exclusively at AutoZone
sampleRecalls.description: The recall involves Shop Pro RV & Marine Antifreeze products manufactured by Prestone for AutoZone. Only bottles filled with blue fluid in one-gallon, clear bottles with date code FT21281 on the bottom of the bottle below the back label are included in the recall. "Shop Pro RV & Marine Antifreeze" is printed on the fr…
hazards: Bottles labeled as Shop Pro RV & Marine Antifreeze were improperly filled with a product containing methanol. These improperly filled bottles do not have the m…

sampleRecalls.title: AutoZone Recalls Booster Cables Due to Electrical Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Valucraft eight gauge and ten gauge booster cables. The cables are orange and have "8GA" or "10GA" printed on them.
hazards: The booster cables clamps were assembled incorrectly resulting in reverse polarity. This poses an electrical shock and explosion hazard to consumers.
injuries: AutoZone has received reports of four incidents of reverse polarity that resulted in minor property damage.
